name: com.zimennik.bayer-dither-urp
description: A single-pass URP post-process renderer feature that combines 4x4 Bayer ordered dithering with pixelization, color quantization, warmth shift, desaturation, film grain and vignette. Designed for retro / lo-fi / PSX-style looks. Works with both RenderGraph (URP 17+) and the legacy compatibility path (URP 14-16).
